glosses.ja: 要求する; 請求する

sentences.target: Je réclame un remboursement au magasin.

translations.fr: Je réclame un remboursement au magasin.
translations.en: I'm asking for a refund at the store.
translations.es: Pido un reembolso en la tienda.
translations.de: Ich bitte im Laden um eine Rückerstattung.
translations.ru: Я прошу вернуть деньги в магазине.
translations.vi: Tôi yêu cầu hoàn tiền ở cửa hàng.
translations.nl: Ik vraag in de winkel om een terugbetaling.
translations.uk: Я прошу повернення коштів у магазині.
translations.hi: मैं दुकान में धनवापसी मांग रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Proszę o zwrot pieniędzy w sklepie.
translations.nb: Jeg ber om refusjon i butikken.
translations.id: Saya meminta pengembalian dana di toko.
translations.cs: Žádám v obchodě o vrácení peněz.
translations.da: Jeg beder om tilbagebetaling i butikken.
translations.ja: 店で返金を求めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun.
Common noun, masculine; direct object (COD) of the verb.
Contraction of à + le; preposition introducing an indirect object/complement.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition (complement of au).

sentences.target: Tu réclames toujours ta part à ta sœur.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁeklam tuʒuʁ ta paʁ a ta sœʁ/

translations.fr: Tu réclames toujours ta part à ta sœur.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁeklam tuʒuʁ ta paʁ a ta sœʁ/
translations.en: You always demand your share from your sister.
translations.es: Siempre le exiges tu parte a tu hermana.
translations.de: Du verlangst von deiner Schwester immer deinen Anteil.
translations.it: Chiedi sempre la tua parte a tua sorella.
translations.ko: 너는 항상 네 몫을 누나에게 요구해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你总是向你姐姐索要你那一份。
translations.yue: 你成日向你家姐要返你嗰份。
translations.ru: Ты всегда требуешь свою долю у сестры.
translations.pt: Você sempre exige a sua parte da sua irmã.
translations.he: אתה תמיד דורש את החלק שלך מאחותך.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşinden her zaman payını istiyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn luôn đòi phần của mình từ chị gái.
translations.ar: أنت دائمًا تطالب بنصيبك من أختك.
translations.nl: Je eist altijd je deel van je zus.
translations.uk: Ти завжди вимагаєш у сестри свою частку.
translations.hu: Mindig a nővéredtől követeled a részedet.
translations.hi: तुम हमेशा अपनी बहन से अपना हिस्सा मांगते हो।
translations.pl: Zawsze domagasz się swojej części od siostry.
translations.el: Πάντα απαιτείς το μερίδιό σου από την αδελφή σου.
translations.nb: Du krever alltid din del fra søsteren din.
translations.id: Kamu selalu menuntut bagianmu dari saudara perempuanmu.
translations.sv: Du kräver alltid din del av din syster.
translations.ro: Îți ceri mereu partea de la sora ta.
translations.cs: Vždy požaduješ svůj podíl od své sestry.
translations.da: Du kræver altid din del fra din søster.
translations.ja: あなたはいつも姉から自分の取り分を要求する。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the verb.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; agrees with 'part'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (COD) of the verb.
Preposition introducing an indirect object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'sœur'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition (COI) after à.

sentences.target: On va réclamer l’addition au serveur.

translations.fr: On va réclamer l’addition au serveur.
translations.en: We're going to ask the waiter for the bill.
translations.es: Vamos a pedir la cuenta al camarero.
translations.de: Wir werden den Kellner um die Rechnung bitten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要向服务员要账单。
translations.pt: Vamos pedir a conta ao garçom.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ gọi phục vụ để lấy hóa đơn.
translations.nl: We gaan de ober om de rekening vragen.
translations.el: Θα ζητήσουμε τον λογαριασμό από τον σερβιτόρο.
translations.nb: Vi skal be kelneren om regningen.
translations.id: Kami akan meminta tagihan dari pelayan.
translations.sv: Vi ska be servitören om notan.
translations.ro: Vom cere nota de la chelner.
translations.ja: ウェイターにお会計をお願いします。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (indefinite/colloquial 'we'), 3rd person singular form.
Auxiliary 'aller', present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms futur proche with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the auxiliary in futur proche.
Definite NP with elided determiner (le + addition); functions as the direct object of 'réclamer'.
Contraction of à + le; introduces the indirect object.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition (recipient).

sentences.target: Ils réclament du calme au voisin.

translations.fr: Ils réclament du calme au voisin.
translations.en: They demand some quiet from the neighbor.
translations.ko: 그들은 이웃에게 조용히 해 달라고 요구한다.
translations.vi: Họ yêu cầu hàng xóm yên tĩnh.
translations.nl: Ze eisen rust van de buurman.
translations.hi: वे पड़ोसी से शांति की मांग करते हैं।
translations.sv: De kräver lugn och ro av grannen.
translations.ro: Ei cer liniște de la vecin.
translations.ja: 彼らは隣人に静かにするよう要求している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive.
Partitive article (de + le), masculine singular; marks an indefinite quantity.
Common noun, masculine (mass noun here); direct object (COD) of the verb.
Contraction of à + le; preposition introducing the indirect object/addressee.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition (recipient/target).
